span.p:
Normalization
• PAN cleanup
• GSTIN validation
• Address parsing

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
TIER 1 — Deterministic
Exact PAN/GSTIN match
(PAN from GSTIN chars 3-12)
Score: 1.0 → Auto-link

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
TIER 2 — Probabilistic
Blocked by pincode
• Name: Jaro-Winkler (50%)
• Address: token sort (30%)
• Phone match (20%)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
TIER 3 — LLM Assist
Claude API on edge cases
(synthetic data only)
Never on raw PII
